column1: Volumetric particle size distributions for 14 major IFCB categories which make up the bulk IFCB particle volume at Station ALOHA averaged per cruise.

column5: columns 4-53 are volume concentration (microliters per liter per micron
column6: with volume calculated from cross-sectional area assuming spherical particles) for 50 log10-spaced diameter bins.

column1: Note: integrating volume concentration over the 50 diameter bins yields total volume concentration in units of microliters per liter per time step and taxa. Summing all volume concentrations per taxa for a single time step yields total volume concentration imaged by the IFCB (in the 3-100 micron size range).
F1-scores quantifying accuracy of particle annotations for the different groups are provided separately.
IFCB Dashboard is available here: https://ifcbdb2.soest.hawaii.edu/datasets
